skill.name: soft-article-writer
skill.description: Generates high-quality promotional soft articles with structured outlines, tailored introductions, and optimized titles based on product info and hot topics. Use when you need to write promotional content, soft articles, or marketing copy that integrates product highlights with current trends, news, or industry insights.
skill.summary: Generates promotional soft articles with structured outlines and optimized titles based on product information and current trends.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 67 potential issues, but all are false positives upon manual evaluation. Backtick patterns in SKILL.md are Markdown code formatting and fenced code blocks, not Ruby shell execution. The weak cryptographic algorithm and system reconnaissance findings are plain text documentation content misinterpreted by the scanner. Network findings reference the source repository URL for attribution only. The skill generates promotional articles and has no confirmed security threats.

low_findings.title: Markdown code formatting misinterpreted as shell execution
low_findings.description: SKILL.md uses Markdown backticks for inline code formatting and fenced code blocks for bash examples. The static scanner interpreted these as Ruby backtick command execution. These are documentation examples, not executable commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed false positive. All backtick content in SKILL.md is Markdown formatting or fenced code blocks used for documentation.

low_findings.title: Plain text content flagged as weak cryptographic algorithm
low_findings.description: Lines in SKILL.md, outline_utils.py, and validate_skill.py were flagged as using weak cryptographic algorithms. The referenced content includes YAML frontmatter, argparse strings, and plain text descriptions. No cryptographic operations exist in this skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed false positive. The flagged lines contain only argparse descriptions and YAML metadata with no cryptographic function calls.

low_findings.title: Source repository URL flagged as network threat
low_findings.description: SKILL.md line 7 contains a URL to the source GitHub repository for attribution. This is standard open-source attribution and not a network threat.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed false positive. URL is the skill's own GitHub source repository cited for attribution purposes.

low_findings.title: Writing guidelines flagged as system reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Lines 48 and 148 of SKILL.md contain output discipline rules and content quality guidelines. Line 48 discusses reproducible results and documenting assumptions. Line 148 warns against aggressive sales language. Neither is system reconnaissance.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed false positive. Content is standard writing workflow documentation, not system discovery commands.

low_findings.title: Audit JSON text flagged as cryptographic and reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Lines in soft-article-writer_audit_result_v2.json were flagged for weak cryptography and system reconnaissance. The content is plain text evaluation notes from a legacy audit report.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed false positive. Content is legacy audit evaluation text with no cryptographic or reconnaissance functionality.

content.user_title: Write promotional soft articles with structured outlines
content.value_statement: Creating promotional content that naturally blends product highlights with current trends requires careful structure and planning. This skill provides a complete workflow for generating outlines, tailored introductions, body sections, and optimized titles in a consistent format.
actual_capabilities: Generate structured article outlines with introduction, body, and conclusion sections
Parse outlines to extract section-specific writing guidance
Write promotional introductions that integrate product highlights with industry trends
Produce detailed body sections covering product features and selling points
Create optimized article titles with call-to-action language
Deliver complete articles in Markdown format for easy publishing
limitations: Cannot access external news or trend sources without user-provided material
Limited to the writing style and theme specified by the user
Does not support automated publishing or distribution to external platforms
Relies on user-provided product information and may produce inaccurate claims if inputs contain errors

use_cases.title: Create marketing content for product launches
use_cases.description: Generate promotional articles that showcase product features alongside relevant industry trends and news.

use_cases.title: Draft structured article templates for clients
use_cases.description: Produce consistent article drafts with clear sections, optimized titles, and appropriate tone for freelance writing projects.

use_cases.title: Prepare product launch announcements
use_cases.description: Generate launch announcements and promotional content with structured sections and compelling calls to action.

prompt_templates.title: Basic article generation with product details
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a soft article for [product name]. Product description: [describe your product]. Key highlights: [list 2-3 selling points]. Hot topic to integrate: [describe the trend or news topic].
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you have a product and a single topic to write about

prompt_templates.title: Article with specific theme and writing style
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a promotional soft article. Product: [product name]. Highlights: [highlights]. Material type: [1 for hotspot and insights, 2 for news and insights, 3 for single material]. Topics: [content]. Insights: [industry insights]. Theme: [specific theme]. Style: [professional, humorous, or casual].
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you need the article to follow a specific theme and writing style

prompt_templates.title: Multi-source article with custom structure
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a soft article. Product: [name]. Highlights: [selling points]. Type 1 with hotspot content [topics] and industry insights [insights]. Style: [style]. Theme: [theme]. Structure: [custom section layout]. Ensure the introduction integrates both materials naturally before introducing the product.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you have multiple source materials and need a custom section layout

prompt_templates.title: Full workflow with outline extraction
prompt_templates.prompt: Execute the full soft article writer workflow. First generate a structured outline with Introduction, Body, and Conclusion based on: Product: [name]. Highlights: [list]. Hotspot content: [topic]. Insights: [insights]. Use the outline parsing script to extract section guidance. Generate each section following the length constraints: 300-500 words for introduction, 800-1500 words for body, 150-250 words for conclusion with call to action.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you want to run the complete documented workflow including outline parsing

output_examples.input: Product: SmartNotes AI, an AI-powered note-taking app. Highlights: automatic transcription, smart tagging, cross-platform sync. Topics: remote work productivity trends.
output_examples.output:
## Introduction

The way we work has changed dramatically over the past few years. Remote and hybrid teams now depend on digital tools to stay connected and productive. Yet many professionals still struggle to keep their notes organized across meetings, projects, and platforms. This is where SmartNotes AI makes a real difference. By combining automatic transcription with intelligent tagging, it helps teams capture and organize information without manual effort. Whether you are in a virtual meeting or brainstorming at your desk, SmartNotes AI helps ensure no important detail gets lost.

output_examples.input: Product: SoundPro Wireless Headphones. Highlights: 40-hour battery life, active noise cancellation, comfortable fit for all-day wear. News: growing demand for remote work audio equipment.
output_examples.output:
Top 3 Candidate Titles:
1. Stay Focused Anywhere: Why SoundPro Headphones Are a Must for Remote Work
2. 40 Hours of Distraction-Free Listening: The SoundPro Wireless Advantage
3. Clear Calls, Quiet Spaces: How SoundPro Redefines the Work-From-Home Audio Experience

best_practices: Provide complete and accurate product information including all key highlights before generating content.
Define the target audience and preferred writing style in advance for more relevant results.
Review and adjust the generated outline before requesting full section writing for better control.
anti_patterns: Requesting articles without providing any source materials or product details.
Asking the skill to fabricate statistics, data citations, or unsupported claims.
Using the skill to produce hard-sell advertisements instead of balanced promotional content.

faq.question: What is a soft article?
faq.answer: A soft article is a promotional piece that integrates product highlights into useful content. Unlike direct advertisements, it provides value through industry insights, trends, or news while naturally introducing the product.

faq.question: What inputs do I need to provide?
faq.answer: You need a product description, key highlights, and at least one type of source material such as a hot topic, news, or industry insights. You can also specify theme, writing style, and custom structure.

faq.question: How long are the generated articles?
faq.answer: The typical article includes a 300 to 500 word introduction, an 800 to 1500 word body, and a 150 to 250 word conclusion. Total length is approximately 1250 to 2250 words.

faq.question: Can I customize the writing style?
faq.answer: Yes. You can specify writing styles such as professional, humorous, casual, or formal. You can also set a specific theme for the article.

faq.question: What format does the output use?
faq.answer: The final article is delivered in Markdown format with clearly labeled sections for Introduction, Body, and Conclusion. The skill also provides optimized title candidates.

faq.question: Does this skill work without Python scripts?
faq.answer: For basic article generation without outline parsing, you can skip the script step and generate sections directly. The outline extraction script is optional for users who want automated section parsing.
